enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions
- Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
enriched_requirements.object: upon issuance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to All India Financial Institutions (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as an 'AIFI') viz.
enriched_requirements.object: India Financial Institutions (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as an 'AIFI') viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear the
meaning as assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs.
enriched_requirements.object: assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(1)"Central counterparty" or "CCP" means a system provider, who by way of novation
interposes between system participants in the transactions admitted for settlement,
thereby becoming the buyer to every seller and the seller to every buyer, for the purpose
of effecting settlement of their transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: by way of novation interposes between system participants in the transactions admitted for settlement, thereby becoming the buy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2)"Clearing member" means a member of, or a direct participant in, a CCP that is entitled
to enter into a transaction with the CCP, regardless of whether it enters into trades with
a CCP for its own hedging, investment or speculative purposes or whether it also enters
into trades as a financial intermediary between the CCP and other market participants.
enriched_requirements.object: a direct participant in, a CCP that is entitled to enter into a transaction with the CCP, regardless of whether it enters into trades

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 or the Companies Act, 2013, or any statutory modification or re-enactment
thereto or other regulations issued by the Reserve Bank of India or the Glossary of Terms
published by Reserve Bank or as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the Companies Act
on the Large Exposures Framework that, inter alia, include provisions: (1) to determine credit exposur

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) conditions under which exposure beyond 20 per cent of its eligible capital base to a
single counterparty shall be permitted;

Additionally, an AIFI shall place an annual review of the implementation of exposure
management measures before the Board by the end of June (September in the case of
NHB).
enriched_requirements.object: of the implementation of exposure management measures before the Board by the end of June (September in the case of NHB)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall apply the large exposure norms on an ongoing basis and in the same
manner as applied for the risk-based capital requirements, i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: norms on an ongoing basis and in the same manner as applied for the risk-based capital requirements, i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI's exposure to all its counterparties shall be subject to the exposure limits as
prescribed in Section D of this Chapter, except for those listed below:
(1) The refinance portfolios of the AIFI.
enriched_requirements.object: exposure limits as prescribed in Section D of this Chapter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the AIFI shall frame a policy approved by its Board to determine credit
exposure limits in respect of its refinancing portfolio.
enriched_requirements.object: by its Board to determine credit exposure limits in respect of its refinancing portfolio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy framed and
assessments made under such a policy shall be subject to supervisory scrutiny.
enriched_requirements.object: scrutiny

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The sum of all the exposure values of an AIFI to a single counterparty shall not be higher
than 20 per cent of the AIFI's available eligible capital base at all times.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent of the AIFI's available eligible capital base at all times

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that Board of the AIFI may allow additional five per cent exposure beyond 20 per
cent but at no time higher than 25 per cent of the AIFI's eligible capital base, subject to the
following conditions:
(1) the AIFI shall put in place a specific Board-approved policy setting out
conditions under which exposure beyond 20 per cent may be considered;
enriched_requirements.object: specific Board-approved policy setting out conditions under which exposure beyond 20 per cent may be considered

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(2) the AIFI shall record in writing the exceptional reasons for which exposure
beyond 20 per cent is being allowed for each specific case.
enriched_requirements.object: exceptional reasons for which exposure beyond 20 per cent is being allowed for each specific case

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that the AIFI may exceed the exposure limit by five per cent of its Tier-I
capital for exposure to a single counterparty, if the additional exposure is on account of
infrastructure 'loan and / or investment'.
enriched_requirements.object: by five per cent of its Tier-I capital for exposure to a single counterparty

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that single counterparty limit shall not exceed 25 per cent in any
case for the AIFI.
enriched_requirements.object: in any case for the AIFI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The sum of all exposure values of an AIFI to a group of connected counterparties shall
not be higher than 25 per cent of the AIFI's available eligible capital base at all times.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent of the AIFI's available eligible capital base at all times

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
Provided that an AIFI may exceed the exposure limit by 10 per cent of its Tier I capital for
exposure to a group of connected counterparties, if the additional exposure is on account
of infrastructure 'loan and / or investment'.
enriched_requirements.object: the exposure limit by 10 per cent of its Tier I capital for exposure to a group of connected counterparties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In some cases, an AIFI may have exposures to a group of counterparties with specific
relationships or dependencies such that, were one of the counterparties to fail, all of the
counterparties would very likely fail.
enriched_requirements.object: group of counterparties with specific relationships or dependencies such that, were one of the counterparties to fail, all of the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such a group of connected counterparties shall be
treated as a single counterparty.
enriched_requirements.object: single counterparty

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The sum of the AIFI's exposure to all the individual entities
included within a group of connected counterparties shall be subject to the exposure limits,
as mentioned in Section D.2 above, and to the regulatory reporting requirements.
enriched_requirements.object: exposure limits, as mentioned in Section D

conditions:
if at least one of the following criteria is satisfied:
(1) Control relationship: one of the counterparties
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Two or more natural or legal persons shall be deemed to be a group of connected
counterparties if at least one of the following criteria is satisfied:
(1) Control relationship: one of the counterparties, directly or indirectly, has control
over the other(s) or the counterparties are, directly or indirectly, controlled by a third
party (an AIFI may or may not have exposure towards this third party).
enriched_requirements.object: a group of connected counterparties if at least one of the following criteria is satisfied: (1) Control relationship: one of the count

conditions:
where a thorough investigation of economic
interdependencies will not be proportionate to the size of the exposures

where the sum of all exposures to one individual
counterparty exceeds five per cent of the eligible capital base
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in order to avoid cases where a thorough investigation of economic
interdependencies will not be proportionate to the size of the exposures, the AIFI
shall identify possible connected counterparties on the basis of economic
interdependence in all cases where the sum of all exposures to one individual
counterparty exceeds five per cent of the eligible capital base, and not in other
cases.
enriched_requirements.object: on the basis of economic interdependence in all cases where the sum of all exposures to one individual coun

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In order to establish the existence of a group of connected counterparties, the AIFI shall
assess the relationship amongst counterparties with reference to paragraphs 14 i(1) and
i(2) above.
enriched_requirements.object: counterparties with reference to paragraphs 14 i(1) and i(2) above

conditions: if one entity owns more than 50 per cent of the voting rights of the other entity
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that if one entity owns more than 50 per cent of the voting rights of the other entity,
the AIFI shall automatically consider that the control relationship criterion [paragraph 14(1)]
is satisfied.
enriched_requirements.object: control relationship criterion [paragraph 14(1)] is satisfied

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that the AIFI shall assess connectedness between counterparties based
on 'control' using the following evidences:
enriched_requirements.object: based on 'control' using the following evidences:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) The AIFI shall also assess the above criteria with respect to a common third
party (such as holding company), irrespective of whether the AIFI has
exposure to that entity or not.
enriched_requirements.object: criteria with respect to a common third party (such as holding company), irrespective of whether the AIFI has exposure to that e

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall also refer to criteria specified in the extant accounting standards for
further qualitative guidance when determining control.
enriched_requirements.object: specified in the extant accounting standards for further qualitative guidance when determining control

conditions:
where clients
have common owners
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While determining control relationship, an AIFI shall also examine cases where clients
have common owners, shareholders or managers;
enriched_requirements.object: clients have common owners, shareholders or managers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This management may be pursuant to a contract concluded
between the undertakings, or to provisions in the memoranda or articles of association of
those undertakings, or if the administrative management or supervisory bodies of the
<image>
undertaking and of one or more other undertakings consist, for the major part, of the same
persons.
enriched_requirements.object: contract concluded between the undertakings, or to provisions in the memoranda or articles of association of those undertakings, or i

conditions: Where control has been established based on any of the above criteria
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where control has been established based on any of the above criteria, in exceptional
cases, an AIFI shall have an option to demonstrate to the RBI (e.g., existence of control
between counterparties due to specific circumstances and corporate governance
safeguards) that such control does not necessarily result in the entities concerned
constituting a group of connected counterparties.
enriched_requirements.object: demonstrate to the RBI (e

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In establishing connectedness based on economic interdependence, the AIFI shall
consider, at a minimum, the following criteria:
(1) Where 50 per cent or more of one counterparty's gross receipts or gross
expenditures (on an annual basis) is derived from transactions with the other
counterparty;
enriched_requirements.object: the following criteria: (1) Where 50 per cent or more of one counterparty's gross receipts or gross expenditures (on an annual

conditions:
Where one counterparty has fully or partly guaranteed the exposure of the other
counterparty
if a claim occurs
enriched_requirements.object: is so significant that the guarantor is likely to default if a claim occurs
repaid

conditions:
Where one counterparty has fully or partly guaranteed the exposure of the other
counterparty
if a claim occurs
enriched_requirements.object: is so significant that the guarantor is likely to default if a claim occurs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI may consider parameters
like networth, EBITDA, liquid assets, etc., to assess whether the guarantor
will be in a position to honour the claim on an on-going basis.
enriched_requirements.object: EBITDA, liquid assets, etc

conditions: if B fails to buy
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Illustrative Example: When a significant part of product / output / services
of Company A is sold to Company B and there are no alternate buyers who
can be approached if B fails to buy, in such a case goods may remain unsold
and could lead to default in loan repayment by A.
enriched_requirements.object: lead to default in loan repayment by A

conditions:
if the criteria would be applicable
to the counterparties under consideration
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For deciding if the criteria would be applicable
to the counterparties under consideration, the AIFI may use financial criteria
like unsold inventory leading to operating loss / default in repayment as well
as subjective criteria like ability of the seller to find alternate buyer / market,
R&D capability of the seller, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: unsold inventory leading to operating loss / default in repayment as well as subjective criteria like ability of the selle
repaid

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI may consider factors like
financial strength of counterparty B to withstand the shock, its ability to find
alternate supplier in place of C, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: strength of counterparty B to withstand the shock, its ability to find alternate supplier in place of C, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Illustrative Example: Examples would include all such cases where
insolvency or default of one company may lead to the insolvency or default
of the other companies.
enriched_requirements.object: or default of the other companies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI may use criteria such as intercorporate
liabilities, significant trade receivables, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: intercorporate liabilities, significant trade receivables, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Illustrative Example: Company A and Company B rely on the same non-
AIFI source for their funding requirements and may not have access to
<image>
alternative sources of funds.
enriched_requirements.object: alternative sources of funds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Economic interdependence with two different entities: If an entity (C) is
economically dependent on two (or more) other entities (A and B) then payment
difficulty of any one of the entities (A or B) may cause payment difficulties to
dependent entity (C).
enriched_requirements.object: dependent entity (C)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, it is possible that there shall be circumstances where some of these criteria
do not automatically imply an economic dependence that results in two or more
counterparties being connected.
enriched_requirements.object: of these criteria do not automatically imply an economic dependence that results in two or more counterparties being conne

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such a scenario, the AIFI shall not be required to
combine these counterparties to form a group of connected counterparties.
enriched_requirements.object: these counterparties to form a group of connected counterparties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the AIFI can demonstrate that a counterparty which is economically closely
related to another counterparty shall be able to overcome financial difficulties, or even the
second counterparty's default, by finding alternative business partners or funding sources
within an appropriate time period.
enriched_requirements.object: financial difficulties, or even the second counterparty's default, by finding alternative business partners or funding sources wit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, there may be situations where
the two types of dependencies are interlinked and could therefore exist within one group of
connected counterparties in such a way that all relevant clients constitute a single risk.
enriched_requirements.object: two types of dependencies are interlinked and could therefore exist within one group of connected counterparties in such a way

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this case, B1 should be part of two
separate groups of A and B.
enriched_requirements.object: separate groups of A and B

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Three different groups of i) A, A1, A2, ii) B, B1, iii) A2, B1, may not be sufficient
as financial difficulties of A2 is likely to cause difficulties for B1 also which is
economically dependent on A2 (which in turn is dependent on A).
enriched_requirements.object: difficulties of A2 is likely to cause difficulties for B1 also which is economically dependent on A2 (which in turn is depe

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
both are economically dependent on each other, which means that
financial difficulty at either entity could impact the other entity.
enriched_requirements.object: either entity could impact the other entity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Downstream Contagion: Downstream contagion should be assumed when an
entity is economically dependent on another entity and is itself the head of a 'control
group'.
enriched_requirements.object: entity is economically dependent on another entity and is itself the head of a 'control group'

conditions: If the other entity is part of a group of connected clients
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the other entity is part of a group of connected clients, the control group of
the economically dependent entity should then be included in the group of connected
counterparties to which the economic dependency relationship exists.
enriched_requirements.object: the group of connected counterparties to which the economic dependency relationship exists

conditions:
If A2 faces financial
difficulty
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If A2 faces financial
difficulty, it may impact B1 adversely, which then is likely to withdraw resources from
its controlled entities B2 and B3.
enriched_requirements.object: then is likely to withdraw resources from its controlled entities B2 and B3

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Upstream Contagion: On the other hand, upstream contagion of entities that
control the economically dependent entity should be assumed only when the
controlling entity is also economically dependent on the entity that constitutes the
economic link between the two controlling groups.
enriched_requirements.object: the controlling entity is also economically dependent on the entity that constitutes the economic link between the two controllin

conditions:
If an AIFI is not
having exposure to all the entities
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Limitations in formulating groups of connected counterparties: If an AIFI is not
having exposure to all the entities, it may be difficult to accurately form group of
connected counterparties.
enriched_requirements.object: form group of connected counterparties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such groups shall be formed on best efforts basis and
the AIFI should take reasonable steps to collect and use relevant information;
enriched_requirements.object: efforts basis and the AIFI should take reasonable steps to collect and use relevant information

conditions:
If there are interconnections
among entities that are not clients of the AIFI
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If there are interconnections
among entities that are not clients of the AIFI, it may be difficult for the AIFI to
formulate correct groupings.
enriched_requirements.object: AIFI to formulate correct groupings

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, the AIFI should incorporate any information
that may be available to it publicly or through other clients or entities outside its
clientele.
enriched_requirements.object: publicly or through other clients or entities outside its clientele

conditions: if an AIFI has exposure to A and B5 only
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For instance, in illustration shown below, if an AIFI has exposure to A and B5 only,
then it may be difficult to formulate correct groupings.
enriched_requirements.object: correct groupings

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall frame a Board-approved policy for determining connectedness using the
criteria mentioned above.
enriched_requirements.object: for determining connectedness using the criteria mentioned above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An exposure to a counterparty shall constitute both on and off-balance sheet exposures
which shall be calculated according to the method prescribed for capital computation under
Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: off-balance sheet exposures which shall be calculated according to the method prescribed for capital computation under Reserve

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The exposures shall be permitted to be offset with credit risk
mitigation techniques permitted in Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions -
Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025, Off-balance sheet items shall be
converted into credit exposure equivalents through the use of credit conversion factors
(CCFs) by applying the CCFs set out the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025, with a floor of 10
per cent.
enriched_requirements.object: offset with credit risk mitigation techniques permitted in Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Prudential Nor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where an AIFI reduces its exposure to the original counterparty on account of an eligible
CRM instrument provided by another counterparty (CRM provider) with respect to that
exposure, it shall also recognise an exposure to the CRM provider.
enriched_requirements.object: to the CRM provider

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The exposures to banks (excluding refinance exposure), except intra-day exposures,
shall be subject to the large exposure limit of 25 per cent of an AIFI's Tier 1 capital.
enriched_requirements.object: large exposure limit of 25 per cent of an AIFI's Tier 1 capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall assign such exposure amount to
specific counterparties of the underlying assets following the LTA described below.
enriched_requirements.object: to specific counterparties of the underlying assets following the LTA described below

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall be permitted to assign the exposure amount to the structure itself, defined
as a distinct counterparty:
Provided that it can demonstrate that the AIFI's exposure amount to each underlying asset
of the structure is smaller than 0.25 per cent of its eligible capital base, considering only
those exposure to underlying assets that result from the investment in the structure itself
and using the exposure value calculated according to paragraphs 35 and 36.
enriched_requirements.object: the exposure amount to the structure itself, defined as a distinct counterparty: Provided that it can demonstrate that the AIFI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall look through the structure and in the case of underlying assets for which
the underlying exposure value is equal to or above 0.25 per cent of its eligible capital base,
the counterparty corresponding to each of the underlying assets shall be identified so that
these underlying exposures can be added to any other direct or indirect exposure to the
<image>
same counterparty.
enriched_requirements.object: and in the case of underlying assets for which the underlying exposure value is equal to or above 0

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
0.25 per cent of the AIFI's eligible capital base shall be assigned to the structure itself (i.e.,
partial look-through is permitted).
enriched_requirements.object: structure itself (i

conditions:
where the total amount of an AIFI's exposures to a structure does not exceed 0.25
per cent of its eligible capital base
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the AIFI is unable to identify the underlying assets of a structure:
(1) where the total amount of an AIFI's exposures to a structure does not exceed 0.25
per cent of its eligible capital base, it shall assign the total exposure amount to the
structure itself, as a distinct counterparty.
enriched_requirements.object: amount to the structure itself, as a distinct counterparty

conditions:
if the exposure to the structure equals or exceeds 0.25 per cent of
its eligible capital base)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Otherwise (i.e., if the exposure to the structure equals or exceeds 0.25 per cent of
its eligible capital base), it shall assign this total exposure amount to the 'unknown
client'.
enriched_requirements.object: amount to the 'unknown client'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the exposure limits shall apply on the aggregate of all such exposures
to 'unknown clients' as if they are a single counterparty.
enriched_requirements.object: of all such exposures to 'unknown clients' as if they are a single counterparty

conditions: Where the LTA is not required (paragraph 30 above)
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where the LTA is not required (paragraph 30 above), the AIFI shall demonstrate that
regulatory arbitrage considerations have not influenced the decision whether to look
through or not - e.g.
enriched_requirements.object: considerations have not influenced the decision whether to look through or not - e

conditions: If LTA need not be applied
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If LTA need not be applied, an AIFI's exposure to the structure shall be the nominal
amount it invests in the structure.
enriched_requirements.object: it invests in the structure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Thus, an AIFI holding a ₹1 investment in a structure,
which invests in 20 assets each with a value of ₹5, shall assign an exposure of ₹0.05 to
each of the counterparties.

An exposure to such counterparty shall be added to any other
direct or indirect exposures the AIFI has to that counterparty.
enriched_requirements.object: other direct or indirect exposures the AIFI has to that counterparty

conditions:
When the LTA (in terms of sections above) is required for an investment in a
structure with different levels of seniority
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any structure with different seniority levels among investors (e.g., securitisation
vehicles): When the LTA (in terms of sections above) is required for an investment in a
structure with different levels of seniority, the exposure value to a counterparty shall be
measured for each tranche within the structure, assuming a pro rata distribution of losses
amongst investors in a single tranche.
enriched_requirements.object: tranche within the structure, assuming a pro rata distribution of losses amongst investors in a single tranche

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
To compute the exposure value to the underlying
asset, an AIFI shall:
<image>
(1) first, consider the lower of the value of the tranche in which the AIFI has invested and
the nominal value of each underlying asset included in the underlying portfolio of assets
(2) second, apply the pro rata share of the AIFI's investment in the tranche to the value
determined in the first step above.
enriched_requirements.object: consider the lower of the value of the tranche in which the AIFI has invested and the nominal value of each underlying asset incl

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Identification of additional risks:
(1) While taking exposures to structures, an AIFI shall identify such third parties which
may constitute an additional risk factor, and which are inherent in the structure itself
rather than in the underlying assets.
enriched_requirements.object: which may constitute an additional risk factor, and which are inherent in the structure itself rather than in the underlyi

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The RBI as a part of its Pillar 2 supervisory review and evaluation process will look
into this aspect and if required specify a specific course of action which may either
include reduction in exposure or raising of additional capital.
enriched_requirements.object: exposure or raising of additional capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) It is conceivable that an AIFI may consider multiple third parties to be potential
drivers of additional risk.
enriched_requirements.object: to be potential drivers of additional risk

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this case, the AIFI shall assign the exposure resulting
from the investment in the relevant structures to each of the third parties.
enriched_requirements.object: from the investment in the relevant structures to each of the third parties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI's exposure to NBFCs (excluding refinance exposure) shall be subject to the
single and group of connected counterparty limits prescribed in paragraphs 11 and 12.
enriched_requirements.object: single and group of connected counterparty limits prescribed in paragraphs 11 and 12

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI's clearing exposure to QCCPs shall be exempt from the large exposures
framework.
enriched_requirements.object: large exposures framework

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, these exposures shall be subject to the regulatory reporting
requirements as prescribed in paragraph 48.
enriched_requirements.object: regulatory reporting requirements as prescribed in paragraph 48

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of non-QCCPs, the AIFI shall measure its exposure as a sum of both the
clearing exposures described in paragraph 42 and the non-clearing exposures described
in paragraph 43, and the same shall be subject to the large exposure limit of 25 per cent of
the eligible capital base.
enriched_requirements.object: a sum of both the clearing exposures described in paragraph 42 and the non-clearing exposures described in paragraph 43, and t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall identify exposures to a CCP related to clearing activities and sum together
these exposures.
enriched_requirements.object: CCP related to clearing activities and sum together these exposures

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall determine the counterparty to which exposures shall be
assigned by applying the provisions of the risk-based capital requirements.
enriched_requirements.object: which exposures shall be assigned by applying the provisions of the risk-based capital requirements

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Exposures
related to clearing activities are listed in the table below together with the exposure value
to be used:
Trade exposures The exposure value of trade exposures shall be
calculated using the exposure measures prescribed in
other parts of these Directions for the respective type of
exposures.
enriched_requirements.object: exposure measures prescribed in other parts of these Directions for the respective type of exposures

conditions:
If equity stakes in a CCP are deducted from the capital on
which the large exposure limit is based
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Other types of exposures that are not directly related to clearing services provided by
the CCP, such as equity stake (If equity stakes in a CCP are deducted from the capital on
which the large exposure limit is based, these shall not be included as exposure to the
CCP), funding facilities, credit facilities, guarantees etc., shall be measured according to
the rules set out in this framework, as for any other type of counterparty.
enriched_requirements.object: to the CCP), funding facilities, credit facilities, guarantees etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall undertake an annual review of the implementation of exposure
management measures and place the same before its Board by the end of June
(September in the case of NHB).
enriched_requirements.object: of the implementation of exposure management measures and place the same before its Board by the end of June (September in

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the review report shall be forwarded to the
concerned office of Department of Supervision.
enriched_requirements.object: concerned office of Department of Supervision

conditions:
if any, shall be under exceptional conditions beyond the
control of an AIFI
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Breach of exposure limits, if any, shall be under exceptional conditions beyond the
control of an AIFI, and needs to be rectified immediately.
enriched_requirements.object: beyond the control of an AIFI, and needs to be rectified immediately

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The breaches shall be reported
to RBI (Department of Supervision, Central Office) immediately.
enriched_requirements.object: (Department of Supervision, Central Office) immediately

conditions: if under breach of exposure limits
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI, if under breach of exposure limits, cannot undertake any further exposure (at
the entity or group level, as the case may be) until it is brought down within the limit.
enriched_requirements.object: brought down within the limit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Failure to comply with the exposure limit may lead to imposition of penalties on the AIFI
by the supervisor.
enriched_requirements.object: penalties on the AIFI by the supervisor

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall report its Large Exposures to the RBI (DOS, CO) as per the reporting
template given in Annex I on a monthly basis.
enriched_requirements.object: to the RBI (DOS, CO) as per the reporting template given in Annex I on a monthly basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The reporting shall cover the following:
(1) All exposures, meeting the definition of large exposure.
enriched_requirements.object: All exposures, meeting the definition of large exposure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to limiting exposures to a single borrower or a group of borrowers, an AIFI
shall consider fixing internal limits for aggregate commitments to specific sectors e.g.,
textiles, chemicals, engineering, etc., to ensure diversified sectoral exposure.
enriched_requirements.object: for aggregate commitments to specific sectors e

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These
sectoral limits shall be fixed based on the AIFI's assessment of perceived risks and
performance of different sectors.
enriched_requirements.object: the AIFI's assessment of perceived risks and performance of different sectors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall review and revise these limits periodically,
as deemed appropriate.
enriched_requirements.object: limits periodically, as deemed appropriate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions -
Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI's aggregate capital market exposure shall include both its direct and indirect
exposures and shall constitute of the following:
(1) direct investment in equity shares, convertible bonds, convertible debentures and
units of equity-oriented mutual funds the corpus of which is not exclusively invested
in corporate debt;
enriched_requirements.object: and indirect exposures and shall constitute of the following: (1) direct investment in equity shares, convertible bonds, conve

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The aggregate exposure of an AIFI to the capital markets in all forms (both fund based
and non-fund based, direct and indirect), on solo as well as consolidated basis shall not
exceed 40 per cent of its net worth, as on March 31 of the previous year.
enriched_requirements.object: of its net worth, as on March 31 of the previous year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the AIFI's direct exposure within this overall ceiling shall not exceed 20 per
cent of its net worth.
enriched_requirements.object: of its net worth

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI's equity investment in a single company that is made in conformity with its
statutory mandate shall not exceed 49 per cent of the equity of the investee company.
enriched_requirements.object: of the equity of the investee company

conditions: Provided that in all other cases
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in all other cases, the AIFI shall not hold more than 10 per cent of the equity
of the investee company as direct investment.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent of the equity of the investee company as direct investment

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: An AIFI shall be permitted to hold up to 49 per cent of equity of a company as a pledgee.
enriched_requirements.object: up to 49 per cent of equity of a company as a pledgee

conditions: Provided that if the AIFI ends up acquiring this in satisfaction of its claims
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that if the AIFI ends up acquiring this in satisfaction of its claims, it shall be brought
down below 10 per cent limit within 3 years.
enriched_requirements.object: 10 per cent limit within 3 years

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI's aggregate investment in equity of non-financial / commercial enterprises,
other than that covered under paragraph 53, shall not exceed 10 per cent of the AIFI's net
worth as on March 31 of the previous year.
enriched_requirements.object: of the AIFI's net worth as on March 31 of the previous year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the Board of the AIFI shall have the freedom to adopt a lower ceiling for the
AIFI, keeping in view its overall risk profile and corporate strategy.
enriched_requirements.object: adopt a lower ceiling for the AIFI, keeping in view its overall risk profile and corporate strategy

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The following items shall be exempted from the capital market exposure limits:
(1) An AIFI's investments in own subsidiaries, joint ventures, State Finance
Corporations (SFCs) and investments in shares and convertible debentures,
convertible bonds issued by institutions forming crucial financial infrastructure such
as Acuité Ratings & Research Limited (Acuité), India SME Technology Services Ltd
(ISTSL), India SME Asset Reconstruction Company Ltd (ISARC), North Eastern
Development Finance Corporation Ltd (NeDFi), National Securities Depository Ltd.
enriched_requirements.object: capital market exposure limits: (1) An AIFI's investments in own subsidiaries, joint ventures, State Finance Corporations (SFCs)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For computing the exposure to the capital markets, loans / advances sanctioned shall
be reckoned with reference to sanctioned limits or outstanding, whichever is higher.
enriched_requirements.object: to sanctioned limits or outstanding, whichever is higher

conditions: Provided that in the case of fully drawn term loans

where there is no scope for re-drawal
of any portion of the sanctioned limit
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in the case of fully drawn term loans, where there is no scope for re-drawal
of any portion of the sanctioned limit, an AIFI shall reckon the outstanding as the exposure.
enriched_requirements.object: the exposure

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI's direct investment in shares, convertible bonds, convertible debentures and
units of equity-oriented mutual funds shall be calculated at their cost price.
enriched_requirements.object: cost price

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed
shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under these
repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions:
if those
directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced
and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those
directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect
of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions
given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
